<a id="class-labelsettings"></a>

# LabelSettings

**Inherits:** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Provides common settings to customize the text in a [Label](class_label.md#class-label).

## Description

**LabelSettings** is a resource that provides common settings to customize the text in a [Label](class_label.md#class-label). It will take priority over the properties defined in [Control.theme](class_control.md#class-control-property-theme). The resource can be shared between multiple labels and changed on the fly, so it's convenient and flexible way to setup text style.

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **font_size** = `16` [🔗](#class-labelsettings-property-font-size)

Size of the text.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-property-line-spacing"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **line_spacing** = `3.0` [🔗](#class-labelsettings-property-line-spacing)

-  **set_line_spacing**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_line_spacing**()

Additional vertical spacing between lines (in pixels), spacing is added to line descent. This value can be negative.

---

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **outline_color** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 1)` [🔗](#class-labelsettings-property-outline-color)

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **outline_size** = `0` [🔗](#class-labelsettings-property-outline-size)

-  **set_outline_size**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_outline_size**()

---

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **paragraph_spacing** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-labelsettings-property-paragraph-spacing)

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-add-stacked-outline"></a>

 **add_stacked_outline**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-add-stacked-outline)

Adds a new stacked outline to the label at the given `index`. If `index` is `-1`, the new stacked outline will be added at the end of the list.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-add-stacked-shadow"></a>

 **add_stacked_shadow**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-add-stacked-shadow)

Adds a new stacked shadow to the label at the given `index`. If `index` is `-1`, the new stacked shadow will be added at the end of the list.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-outline-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **get_stacked_outline_color**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-outline-color)

Returns the color of the stacked outline at `index`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-outline-size"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_stacked_outline_size**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-outline-size)

Returns the size of the stacked outline at `index`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-shadow-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **get_stacked_shadow_color**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-shadow-color)

Returns the color of the stacked shadow at `index`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-shadow-offset"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_stacked_shadow_offset**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-shadow-offset)

Returns the offset of the stacked shadow at `index`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-shadow-outline-size"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_stacked_shadow_outline_size**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-get-stacked-shadow-outline-size)

Returns the outline size of the stacked shadow at `index`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-move-stacked-outline"></a>

 **move_stacked_outline**(from_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), to_position: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-move-stacked-outline)

Moves the stacked outline at index `from_index` to the given position `to_position` in the array.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-move-stacked-shadow"></a>

 **move_stacked_shadow**(from_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), to_position: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-move-stacked-shadow)

Moves the stacked shadow at index `from_index` to the given position `to_position` in the array.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-remove-stacked-outline"></a>

 **remove_stacked_outline**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-remove-stacked-outline)

Removes the stacked outline at index `index`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-remove-stacked-shadow"></a>

 **remove_stacked_shadow**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-remove-stacked-shadow)

Removes the stacked shadow at index `index`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-outline-color"></a>

 **set_stacked_outline_color**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), color: [Color](class_color.md#class-color)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-outline-color)

Sets the color of the stacked outline identified by the given `index` to `color`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-outline-size"></a>

 **set_stacked_outline_size**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), size: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-outline-size)

Sets the size of the stacked outline identified by the given `index` to `size`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-shadow-color"></a>

 **set_stacked_shadow_color**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), color: [Color](class_color.md#class-color)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-shadow-color)

Sets the color of the stacked shadow identified by the given `index` to `color`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-shadow-offset"></a>

 **set_stacked_shadow_offset**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), offset: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-shadow-offset)

Sets the offset of the stacked shadow identified by the given `index` to `offset`.

---

<a id="class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-shadow-outline-size"></a>

 **set_stacked_shadow_outline_size**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), size: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-labelsettings-method-set-stacked-shadow-outline-size)

Sets the outline size of the stacked shadow identified by the given `index` to `size`.
